# FlowMind

> AI Workplace Assistant that helps professionals draft emails, summarize meetings, plan their day, and research any topic — all in one premium dark-themed dashboard.

FlowMind is a SaaS-style productivity app powered by AI. Each tool is built around a focused workflow with structured, ready-to-use output.

## Pages

- [Dashboard](/): Personalized greeting, usage stats, quick actions, and recent AI activity feed.
- [Email Generator](/email): Draft professional emails with tone and audience controls.
- [Meeting Summarizer](/meetings): Convert raw notes or transcripts into summaries, action items, and follow-ups.
- [Task Planner](/tasks): Auto-prioritize tasks into a time-blocked daily schedule with reasoning.
- [Research Assistant](/research): Get structured insights, next steps, and open questions on any topic.
- [Settings](/settings): Customize name, default tone, AI response length, and theme.
